title: HabitProgress
description: A profile's aggregate game-layer state — XP, level, per-habit streaks, badges, and the game-layer-enabled flag. Provided by Module 8 (Habits) to Social and Inbox. CROSS-USER-SAFE PROJECTION: contains NO monetary value, account name, merchant, or source reference (FR-SOC-001); XP is derived from integer event/streak counts and is NEVER a function of any money amount. The game layer is opt-in and fully disable-able (FR-HAB-001): when game_layer_enabled is false, consumers MUST render no game UI and the figures below are inert.

game_layer_enabled.description: Per-profile opt-in. False ⇒ no game UI; all real financial micro-actions (incl. the daily ritual) still function (FR-HAB-001).

xp.description: Experience points. Derived server-side from qualifying real-action events and streak length — NEVER from a monetary amount, NEVER client-asserted.

name_fr.description: Badge name, fr-CA. A missing fr name is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

freshness.description: Aggregate freshness; depends on freshness-stamped consumed completion events.
